requirement.en: If you have a face-up EARTH Attribute Machine Type monster on your field during a turn you have not activated "Happy Journal", declare a card type (Monster, Spell, or Trap).

effect.en: Your opponent excavates the top 2 cards of their Deck and places them on top of their Deck in the same order. Draw cards equal to [the number of cards of the declared card type among the excavated cards].
